scope: Function-level nodes and edges for the Coco/R bytecode VM's runtime safety primitives: the budget-less interpret loop, the exit(1)-on-overflow stack, the format-string opcode primitive, and the absent call-depth gates.

nodes_added.name: Machine::Interpret
nodes_added.summary: Main VM loop. `for(;;)` over Step() with no budget guard.

nodes_added.name: Machine::Step
nodes_added.summary: Opcode dispatcher. Contains all case_cocXxx bodies. Not deep-read end-to-end here; key cases re-traced individually.

nodes_added.name: Machine::Push
nodes_added.summary: VM data-stack push. On overflow: OnError, system("PAUSE>0"), exit(1) — terminates process.

nodes_added.name: Machine::Pop
nodes_added.summary: VM data-stack pop. On underflow: OnError, system("PAUSE>0"), exit(1) — terminates process.

nodes_added.name: Machine::Interpret cocFORMAT
nodes_added.summary: Format opcode. Classifier looks at trailing 2 chars only; non-numeric branch (line 1597) invokes MFC CString::Format with single supplied arg — varargs printf with mismatched arg count → format-string primitive.

nodes_added.name: Machine::Interpret cocCALLO
nodes_added.summary: Call of kernel method (OnDoFunc). No depth check.

nodes_added.name: Machine::Interpret cocCALLF
nodes_added.summary: Unified function call (kernel/script/native). No depth check.

nodes_added.name: Machine::Interpret cocENTER
nodes_added.summary: Enter function frame. Pushes BP. No depth gate.

nodes_added.name: Machine::Interpret cocPCALL
nodes_added.summary: Prepare-call. Pushes 7 saves. No depth gate. Recursion fills data stack until Push overflows.

nodes_added.name: Machine::Interpret cocLEAVE
nodes_added.summary: Leave function frame. Pops BP. No counter decrement (because no counter exists).

edges_added.note: exit(1) on stack overflow — kills the entire WCF service host.
Format with one supplied arg; format string may contain N specifiers — undefined behaviour or `%n` write primitive.
Numeric branches; mismatch invokes invalid-parameter handler → typically process termination.
No m_nCallDepth counter; only ceiling is data-stack size 32768.
Same as cocCALLO, unified path for unknown call kind.
7-double save state per call; recursion of depth 32768/7≈4600 overflows.

notes: cocFORMAT's format-string primitive is sharper than the prior review's M8 framing: not just a 'service-crash' but at least 'service-crash plus plausible info-leak'. Wire reachability for the format-string itself remains unproven and is flagged as an open question for future tracing.
